scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth,podcast,worker,realtime,ai-engine -c blue,green,yellow,cyan,magenta,red "pnpm --filter api-gateway dev" "pnpm --filter auth-service dev" "pnpm --filter podcast-service dev" "pnpm --filter podcast-service worker" "pnpm --filter realtime-service dev" "cd services/ai_engine && .venv\Scripts\python -m app.main"
